daily.topThemeTitle: Who Gets In, and Who Gets Counted
daily.topThemeBody: Transfer credit loss, young men's skepticism about value, the new duration-of-status rule for international students, and prestige-driven publication all describe the same narrowing pipeline.

themes.title: Who Gets In, and Who Gets Counted

heroWeek.themeBody: Canvas paused data delivery over a potential security threat, while SonicWall found 61% of exploits land within 48 hours of proof-of-concept and 77% of organizations take over a week to patch.
